<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Returns true when a fragment is valid at `asOf`.

Omitted `asOf` has no clock to compare against, so it admits only fragments
that are live and not valid-time delayed.

## Import

```ts
import { memoryFragmentValidAt } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

## Signature

```ts
function memoryFragmentValidAt(
	fragment: MemoryFragment,
	asOf?: bigint,
): boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `fragment` | `MemoryFragment` | Missing @param fragment JSDoc. |
| `asOf` | `bigint` | Missing @param asOf JSDoc. |

## Returns

`boolean`
